welcome_offer.description: Earn 70,000 bonus miles after $3,000 spend in 3 months, plus 10,000 bonus miles after adding an AU in the first 3 months.

earning_rates.notes: 6x member + 3x card for MileagePlus member's fare.
On hotel stays when booked with the hotel.

annual_credits.name: United Hotels Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 annually on prepaid hotel stays via United Hotels.

annual_credits.name: Rideshare Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $60 in statement credits for rideshare purchases.

annual_credits.name: Avis/Budget Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $50 annually when booking through cars.united.com.

annual_credits.name: Instacart Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $120 annually for Instacart purchases.

annual_credits.name: JSX Credit
annual_credits.description: Up to $100 annually for JSX flights.

other_benefits.name: United Club Passes
other_benefits.description: 2 one-time passes every account anniversary year.

other_benefits.name: Free 1st Checked Bag
other_benefits.description: Primary cardmember and one companion save up to $160 per roundtrip.

other_benefits.name: Priority Boarding
other_benefits.description: Board United-operated flights prior to general boarding.

other_benefits.name: Global Entry/TSA PreCheck
other_benefits.description: Up to $120 statement credit every 4 years.

sources.notes: TPG report on annual fee increase Mar 2025.
